login.title: Surey Yoma
login.subtitle: Admin Portal
login.heading: Sign in
login.description: Enter your credentials to access the admin panel
login.networkError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Welcome to Surey Yoma
dashboard.subtitle: Your employee engagement survey platform
dashboard.gettingStartedDescription: Complete these steps to run your first survey
dashboard.step3: Import employee email list and send invitations

surveys.title: Surveys
surveys.emptyBody: Create a survey to start collecting employee feedback.
surveys.uploadHint: Upload an Excel file to preview questions before saving.
surveys.uploadDropzone: Drag and drop your .xlsx file here, or click to browse
surveys.uploadFormatError: File must be an .xlsx or .xls file.
surveys.uploadParseError: Could not read questions from this file. Check that columns match the expected format.
surveys.deleteConfirmBody: All associated questions and invitation links will be removed permanently.

settings.title: Settings
settings.smtpDescription: Configure your outbound email server to send survey invitations.
settings.testFailure: Could not connect to SMTP server. Check your host and port, then try again. Error: {error}
settings.testAuthFailure: Authentication failed. Check your username and password.
settings.saveError: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

email.smtpModalBody: To send survey invitations to employees, you need to configure your outbound email server first.
email.inviteEmailsPlaceholder: Paste email addresses, one per line or comma-separated
email.inviteEmailsNone: Enter at least one email address to continue.

errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to view this page
